findPlayer.title: Find Player
findPlayer.subtitle: Search for registered players by name, Steam ID or Steam profile URL.
findPlayer.searchLabel: Search by name, Steam ID or profile URL
findPlayer.searchPlaceholder: Start typing a name or paste a Steam URL…
findPlayer.noOptionsEmpty: No players found. Try typing a Steam ID or URL.
findPlayer.inputErrorEmpty: Please enter a Steam ID, Steam name, or profile URL
findPlayer.inputErrorNotFound: Player not found. Check the Steam ID or URL and try again.
findPlayer.inputErrorSteamNotConfigured: Steam API is not configured. Vanity URLs cannot be resolved – enter a Steam ID64 instead or ask an admin to set the Steam Web API key in Settings.
findPlayer.searchError: Failed to search for player. Please try again.
findPlayer.modalSelectPrompt: {{count}} players found. Select one to view their profile:

playerPage.skillRatingTooltip: Skill Rating is based on OpenSkill. Around 1500 is a typical starting rating; higher is better.
playerPage.tournamentFinishedNoMatches: Tournament finished – you have no more matches.
playerPage.finalRecord: Final record: {{wins}} win(s) / {{losses}} loss(es) in this tournament.
playerPage.noUpcomingMatch: No upcoming match scheduled for you right now.
playerPage.noUpcomingHint: The tournament is still in progress, but your matches are complete.
playerPage.noActiveHint: Once the next round is generated and your match is ready, it will appear here with server connect info.

teamPage.wantYourStats: Want to see your own stats and match history?
teamPage.noMatchNowHint: Your next match will appear here. Use your player page for veto and server connect.
teamPage.noMatchesYetHint: The tournament hasn't started yet. Once it begins, your matches will appear here.
teamPage.goToPlayerPage: Veto, connect & details → Your player page

teamMatchHistory.title: Match History
teamMatchHistory.noMaps: No maps available for this match.

leaderboardPage.emptyDescription: Once a tournament is created and matches are played, standings will appear here.
leaderboardPage.adrDataLater: ADR data will appear once matches report stats.
leaderboardPage.tournamentCompletedAlert: Tournament completed! Check the leaderboard below for final rankings.
leaderboardPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or Steam ID…

teamsPage.shuffleInfo: Shuffle tournaments create temporary round teams behind the scenes. Those are hidden here so this list only shows your real teams.

empty.title: No teams yet
empty.description: Create your first team to get started with the tournament

vetoInterface.vetoNotAvailable: Veto not available for this match
vetoInterface.vetoUnavailable: Veto details are unavailable for this account. Sign in as a player on one of the two teams to continue the veto.

vetoInterface.waitingToPick: Waiting for {{team}} to pick a map

vetoInterface.waitingForSidePick: Waiting for {{team}} to choose their starting side...

errors.notYourTurn: It's not your turn. Waiting for the other team.
